description: Audit the streaming service subscriptions to provide normalized costs across billing cycles, renewal dates, shared subscription amounts owed, and cost-per-hour metrics for decision making.

natural_language.prompt: You have a spreadsheet with streaming service subscription data. Add calculated columns to: (1) normalize annual subscriptions to monthly cost, (2) calculate days until renewal, (3) flag subscriptions renewing soon, (4) calculate cost per hour watched, and (5) determine amounts owed from shared subscriptions.
